description:
The rear package can be installed with the following command: 
$ sudo dnf install rear
rationale:
<tt>rear</tt> contains the Relax-and-Recover (ReaR) utility. ReaR produces a bootable
image of a system and restores from backup using this image.
ocil_clause: the rear package is not installed
ocil:
Run the following command to determine if the rear package is installed: 
$ rpm -q rear
platforms: not ((s390x_arch and os_linux[rhel]<=8.4) or (os_linux[rhel]>=9.0 and aarch64_arch) or (os_linux[ol]>=9.0 and aarch64_arch))
title: Install rear Package
